item.title: Farm Building Framing Nears Completion
item.description: Framing work on a new farm structure moves toward completion, showing construction progress, structural assembly, and development of new facilities.

media:content.media:title: Farm Building Framing Nears Completion
media:content.media:description: Framing work on a new farm structure moves toward completion, showing construction progress, structural assembly, and development of new facilities.

item.title: New Tractor Review on the Farm
item.description: A closer look at a new tractor and its features on the farm. Performance, handling, and practical use are explored during real field work.

media:content.media:title: New Tractor Review on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A closer look at a new tractor and its features on the farm. Performance, handling, and practical use are explored during real field work.

item.title: Caught Red Handed on the Farm
item.description: A surprising moment unfolds on the farm when something unexpected is discovered. Real reactions and day-to-day rural life captured as events play out.

media:content.media:title: Caught Red Handed on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A surprising moment unfolds on the farm when something unexpected is discovered. Real reactions and day-to-day rural life captured as events play out.

item.title: Preparing for Corn Harvest on the Farm
item.description: Farm equipment is readied and fields are checked as corn harvest season approaches. A look at planning, maintenance, and preparation for a busy harvest.

media:content.media:title: Preparing for Corn Harvest on the Farm
media:content.media:description: Farm equipment is readied and fields are checked as corn harvest season approaches. A look at planning, maintenance, and preparation for a busy harvest.

item.title: Big Carts Small Trucks Episode 19
item.description: Episode 19 follows farm equipment in action as grain carts and small trucks handle heavy loads. Real field work and harvest logistics in motion.

media:content.media:title: Big Carts Small Trucks Episode 19
media:content.media:description: Episode 19 follows farm equipment in action as grain carts and small trucks handle heavy loads. Real field work and harvest logistics in motion.

item.title: A Month of Farming on the Field
item.description: A look back at a full month of farm work. Covering planting, maintenance, and harvest tasks, showing the pace and challenges of daily agricultural operations.

media:content.media:title: A Month of Farming on the Field
media:content.media:description: A look back at a full month of farm work. Covering planting, maintenance, and harvest tasks, showing the pace and challenges of daily agricultural operations.

item.title: Delivering Grain from the Farm
item.description: A look at hauling and dropping off grain after harvest. Covering transport, unloading, and the workflow involved in moving crops from field to storage or market.

media:content.media:title: Delivering Grain from the Farm
media:content.media:description: A look at hauling and dropping off grain after harvest. Covering transport, unloading, and the workflow involved in moving crops from field to storage or market.

item.title: Checking a Failing Tractor Radiator
item.description: A farm equipment inspection focused on a failing radiator. Diagnosing cooling issues, checking components, and understanding how it affects field operations.

media:content.media:title: Checking a Failing Tractor Radiator
media:content.media:description: A farm equipment inspection focused on a failing radiator. Diagnosing cooling issues, checking components, and understanding how it affects field operations.

item.title: Brody’s Christmas Present Arrives
item.description: A Christmas surprise arrives for Brody. A simple look at the moment of receiving and unboxing a long-awaited gift during the holiday season.

media:content.media:title: Brody’s Christmas Present Arrives
media:content.media:description: A Christmas surprise arrives for Brody. A simple look at the moment of receiving and unboxing a long-awaited gift during the holiday season.
